subcodes.first_line: O servants of the Abha Beauty! The letter ye had addressed to Siyyid Taqí hath been perused and its contents noted. Ye had written of the transgressions of the villainous Taqí
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان جمال ابهی رقیم و نمیقی که بجناب سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @justice and wrath of God
